store.name: Signal Stitch Archive
store.tagline: Visible mending kits for clothes worth keeping

collections.name: Garment repair kits
collections.description: Specific bundles for denim knees, sweater elbows, socks, cuffs, chore coats, and kids’ trousers.

collections.name: Mending materials
collections.description: Sashiko thread, wool yarn cards, patch cloth stacks, denim offcuts, backing fabrics, stabilizers, and color-matched thread sets.

collections.name: Tools and instruction goods
collections.description: Darning mushrooms, hoops, curved needles, thimbles, snips, seam rippers, fabric pencils, repair rulers, stitch sample cards, repair maps, zines, swatches, and care labels.

collections.name: Archive collections
collections.description: Indigo workwear palette, school-uniform survival kit, moth-hole wool refresh, and travel sewing roll.

products.name: Denim Knee Rescue Bundle
products.description: Indigo patch cloth, backing fabric, sashiko thread, curved needles, repair ruler, and a knee-map guide.

products.name: Sweater Elbow Mend Set
products.description: Soft wool yarn card, stabilizer, rounded needles, sample stitch card, and elbow placement template.

products.name: Cuff Rebuild Packet
products.description: Backing tape, sturdy thread, fabric pencil, patch cloth, and a fold-over cuff repair map.

products.name: School Trouser Survival Kit
products.description: Durable patch stack, color-matched thread, care labels, practice swatch, and quick rescue instructions.

products.name: Sashiko Thread Color Set
products.description: Indigo, natural, rust, and coal thread cards for visible stitch lines.

products.name: Patch Cloth Stack
products.description: Layerable cotton, workwear twill, and denim-weight pieces for reinforcement.

products.name: Backing Fabric & Stabilizer Set
products.description: Support cloth and stabilizers for clean edges under stress points.

products.name: Darning Mushroom
products.description: A shaped support tool for sock heels, sweater holes, and curved fabric tension.

products.name: Curved Needle Set
products.description: Needles for cuffs, elbows, knees, and dense fabric layers.

products.name: Repair Ruler
products.description: A ruler for clean grids, seam distance, and patch margins.

products.name: Technique Zine: First Visible Mends
products.description: Printed stitch samples, practice swatches, and care notes for first-time visible menders.

products.name: Indigo Workwear Palette
products.description: Denim offcuts, sashiko thread, chore-coat patch cloth, and repair maps for blue-on-blue reinforcement.

products.name: Moth-Hole Wool Refresh
products.description: Wool yarn cards, darning guidance, stabilizer, and care labels for sweater repairs that blend or bloom.

products.name: Travel Sewing Roll
products.description: Snips, thimble, curved needles, fabric pencil, thread cards, and a compact repair map for packed clothes.
